title: Renhoek (transports)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Stormtrooper transport group|[[Renhoek (MC80 Star Cruiser)|the MC80 cruiser]]}}
'''''Renhoek''''' was a group of at least six [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] based on the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Stimsenj'kat]]''.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], they participated in the recovery of much needed [[lonsigar]] from abandoned [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]] in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field, and faced the first combat deployment of the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Advanced]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. All of the transports completed their mission and fled aboard the ''Stimsenj'kat''.

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Renhoek'' is similar to "Ren Höek," a lead character from the cartoon series ''[[Wikipedia:The Ren & Stimpy Show|Ren & Stimpy]]''. The name of the transport group's home cruiser ''Stimsenj'kat'' is similar to "Stimpson J. Cat," the series' other lead character. The transport group also shared its name with another video game vessel, the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Renhoek (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Renhoek'']] from ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.
